hints.answer: Start by using fetch() with the user endpoint URL, built by concatenating the base URL with the username

hints.answer: Check if the response has an error key using hasKey() before processing items

hints.answer: Loop through the items to extract artist API URLs, then fetch each one to get the artist name

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Build the sentence by joining artist names with commas, using ', and ' before the last one
